name: unique-picker

metadata.name: unique-picker
metadata.summary: A package for unique random selection

documentation:
# Unique Picker

A Python package to randomly select an item from a list without repeating until all items are covered.

## Installation
```bash
pip install unique-picker
```

# Usage

```bash
import unique_picker

data_list = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
for _ in range(10):
    print(unique_picker.choice(data_list))

```

functions.name: uniquePicker.core.choice
documentation: Select a random item from the list without repeating until all items are covered.

methods.name: uniquePicker.core.UniqueRandom.__init__
documentation: Initialize with a list of items.

methods.name: uniquePicker.core.UniqueRandom.choice
documentation:
Return a random item from the list without repeating
until all items are exhausted in the current cycle.
